paths.label: Tithe
paths.blurb: The first tenth. A weekly act of trust that says God is first.

paths.label: Offering
paths.blurb: Generosity beyond. Funds the weekly life of the church — every campus, every Sunday.

paths.label: Vision partner
paths.blurb: Build what’s next. 200 campuses, 10,000 leaders, 200,000 souls. Partner monthly.

paths.label: Capital
paths.blurb: Spaces that hold what God is building. Land, buildings, campuses, college.
